target_user: Sales reps, recruiters, and operators repeatedly entering the same contact details into web forms.
one_sentence_value: Save one local profile and fill visible lead form fields on the current page in one click.
pricing_positioning: Current sandbox revision is free-only. Packaging should still feel premium without inventing a paid tier.
trust_positioning: Professional, minimal-permission, single-purpose utility with real browser-smoke proof and plain privacy language.
local_only_claim: Uses local Chrome storage and only acts on the active tab after a user click.
no_login_claim: No account, login, or workspace setup is required for the core flow.
no_upload_claim: Does not upload profile data or page content to a remote service.
pro_value_message: Keep the product feeling paid-quality now, and reserve explicit Pro messaging until monetization is turned on truthfully.

visual_style.composition_direction: Editorial product marketing with restrained overlays and real UI focal points.
visual_style.screenshot_usage: Always start from a real browser-smoke screenshot and add concise annotations only.

screenshot_storyboard.title: Save One Profile Once
screenshot_storyboard.user_question_answered: What does this extension do in one sentence?
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_headline: Save one local profile for repeat form work.
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Keep one reliable set of contact details ready in the popup.
screenshot_storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Real popup UI only. Do not show unsupported sync or team features.

screenshot_storyboard.title: Fill The Active Page
screenshot_storyboard.user_question_answered: How fast is the core action?
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_headline: Fill the active form in one click.
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Use the extension action only when you are ready to fill visible fields.
screenshot_storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Show a real form page and keep the claim to visible supported fields.

screenshot_storyboard.title: See The Filled Result
screenshot_storyboard.user_question_answered: What result should I expect after using it?
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_headline: Get a clean filled result without retyping.
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_subcopy: The happy path should show real field coverage, not a mock result.
screenshot_storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Must stay tied to the actual browser-smoke scenario.

screenshot_storyboard.title: Low-Permission Workflow
screenshot_storyboard.user_question_answered: Why should I trust the permission footprint?
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_headline: Minimal permissions. No broad host access.
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Storage, activeTab, and scripting only for the current supported wedge.
screenshot_storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Do not imply more automation than the current permission set allows.

screenshot_storyboard.title: Trust And Privacy
screenshot_storyboard.user_question_answered: Why is this safer than a broader workflow tool?
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_headline: Local-only profile storage. No account required.
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Privacy language must stay literal and provable in the bundle.
screenshot_storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Only use claims that match the real storage and network behavior.

promo_tile_concept: A branded value card that pairs one real popup crop with a concise promise about one local profile and one-click fill.
marquee_concept: A wide trust-first composition showing popup, form context, and a restrained privacy message without fake social proof.
landing_hero_concept: A calm product hero that frames the popup and filled-form result as one continuous workflow.
short_video_concept: A 15-second flow from popup save, to active page, to filled result, ending on low-permission and no-login trust copy.
store_listing_quality_goals: Store screenshots stay traceable to browser-smoke captures.
Promo assets feel premium without pretending to be the app itself.
Privacy and permission claims match the actual bundle and QA evidence.
Any future paid tier is disclosed clearly in both listing and UI.
blocked_claims: No upload if network verification would contradict the claim
next_step: Generate branded still assets from the storyboard and block publish until the premium asset quality gate passes.
